blogSubtitle: Labarai da sabbin abubuwa daga dandali
documentationSubtitle: Jagora da koyarwa don fara amfani da dandali
faqSubtitle: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da dandali
contactFaq: Idan kana da tambayoyi, ka tuntuɓe mu
cookiePolicyDescription: Manufarmu game da cookies da yadda muke amfani da su
privacyPolicyDescription: Manufarmu ta sirri da yadda muke amfani da bayananku
refundPolicyDescription: Sharuɗɗan soke biyan kuɗi da mayar da kuɗi
contactDescription: Tuntuɓe mu don duk wata tambaya ko ra'ayi
contactSubheading: Za mu amsa maka da wuri-wuri
contactError: An samu kuskure wajen aika saƙonka
contactSuccessDescription: Mun karɓi saƙonka kuma za mu amsa maka da wuri-wuri
contactErrorDescription: An samu kuskure wajen aika saƙonka. Ka sake gwadawa daga baya
footerDescription: Avilyre tana taimaka wa sashen sayayya da sarkar samar da kaya wajen hango gazawar masu kawo kaya ta hanyar makin haɗari da AI.

home.pillText: Dandali na sarrafa haɗarin masu kawo kaya
home.heroSubtitle: Avilyre tana taimaka maka gane, auna da hango haɗarin masu kawo kaya — na kuɗi, aiki, siyasar ƙasa da ESG — a lokaci na gaske.
home.featuresHeadingBold: Kallon 360° na haɗarinka na masu kawo kaya.
home.featuresHeadingNormal: Tattara, auna da hango. Kada ka sake rasa gano gazawar mai kawo kaya mai muhimmanci.
home.feature1Description: Kowane mai kawo kaya yana karɓar makin amincewa gaba ɗaya (0–100) wanda ake lissafa ta atomatik daga fannonni 4: kuɗi, aiki, siyasar ƙasa da ESG.
home.feature2Description: Karɓi faɗakarwa a lokaci na gaske da zarar mai kawo kaya ya ƙetare iyaka mai muhimmanci. Saita dokokinka na faɗakarwar.
home.feature3Description: Gani fallasawar yanki na sarkar samar da kayanka da gano wuraren haɗarin ƙasa.
home.feature4Description: Fitar da cikakkun rahotannin bin doka. Kula da cikakken tarihin duk kimantawa don bita na ciki da na hukuma.
home.dimensionsSubtitle: Cikakkiyar kimantawa ta fannonni da yawa don kada ka rasa wata alama ta gargaɗi.
home.finalCtaHeading: Kana shirye don kare sarkar samar da kayanka?
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Fara kyauta. Ba a buƙatar katin kuɗi.
home.demoHighRisk: MASU KAWO KAYA MAI HAƊARI SOSAI

pricingPage.footerNote: Gwaji kyauta na kwanaki 14, ba tare da katin kuɗi ba. Biyan kuɗi na shekara-shekara yana samuwa (watanni 2 kyauta). Biyan kuɗi mai tsaro ta Paddle.

faqItems.question: Kuna ba da gwaji kyauta?
faqItems.answer: Ee, gwaji kyauta na kwanaki 14 ba tare da katin kuɗi ba. Bayan haka, kana iya biyan kuɗi don shiri ko ci gaba a matakin kyauta mai iyaka.

faqItems.question: Zan iya soke biyan kuɗina?
faqItems.answer: Ee, a kowane lokaci, daga yankin biyan kuɗinka ko shafin mai amfani na Paddle. Duba manufarmu ta mayar da kuɗi don cikakkun sharuɗɗa.

faqItems.question: Ina zan iya samo lissafina?
faqItems.answer: Lissafinka yana samuwa a shafin mai amfani na Paddle, wanda za a iya shiga daga yankin biyan kuɗinka.

faqItems.question: Wane hanyoyin biyan kuɗi kuke karɓa?
faqItems.answer: Biyan kuɗi ta katin an sarrafa shi ta Paddle, mai biya namu. Biyan kuɗi ta banki yana yiwuwa kan buƙata ga farkon masu amfani.

faqItems.question: Zan iya canza shirina?
faqItems.answer: Ee, kana iya tafi zuwa shiri mafi girma ko ƙarami a kowane lokaci daga yankin biyan kuɗinka.

faqItems.question: Ina bayananmu ke ajiye?
faqItems.answer: Bayananku ana ajiye su a Tarayyar Turai (Supabase), an yi musu encryptions yayin wucewa da ajiyewa, tare da keɓancewa mai tsanani tsakanin asusun masu amfani.
